== Notes for [[Item:Q99774|Q99774]] ==

The Abarbanel Family Scroll alludes to Ezra being part of the chain of tradition in Spain. According to available resources, the only Jew named Ezra was Ezra ibn Shaprut. This was found in an undated handwritten manuscript from the collection of the late Rabbi Shmuel Gorr, held by Chaim Freedman.

Reference was made to “Elef Margaliot” 1993, Meir Wunder.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD7F42D71EFBBFA9822EF79916CB2DF
geni:6000000017146028689

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
